source.title: Unlocking the Church’s Ancient Libraries with AI | Catholic Futurist

summary.title_hr: Otključavanje drevnih crkvenih knjižnica uz pomoć umjetne inteligencije | Katolički futurist
summary.abstract_hr: Ovaj podcast istražuje projekt Alexandria Digitization Hub u Rimu, inicijativu koju vode otac David Nazar i Matthew Harvey Sanders. Cilj projekta je digitalizacija drevnih crkvenih tekstova pomoću umjetne inteligencije i naprednih skenera, čineći ih globalno dostupnima za istraživanje i obrazovanje. Razgovor naglašava kako AI omogućuje ispravljanje povijesnih pogrešaka, potiče ekumenski dijalog i transformira katoličko obrazovanje, ističući potencijal tehnologije za ljudski razvoj i zajedničko dobro.
key_points: Projekt Alexandria Digitization Hub digitalizira jedinstvenu knjižnicu Orientalnog istočnog instituta u Rimu, koja sadrži građu o svim istočnim crkvama, od Rusije do Etiopije i od južne Italije do južne Indije, s ciljem globalne dostupnosti.

Umjetna inteligencija omogućuje napredno pretraživanje tekstova na više drevnih i modernih jezika, konceptualno povezujući pojmove, što otvara neviđene mogućnosti za dubinsko istraživanje i analizu povijesnih dokumenata.

Digitalizacija pomaže u reviziji povijesnih narativa, kao što je slučaj Nestoriusa, čije je proglašenje heretikom možda bilo rezultat jezičnih nejasnoća i nedostatka šireg konteksta, što sada AI može razjasniti.

Tehnologija, unatoč početnim brigama, poboljšava ljudsku komunikaciju u obrazovanju, potičući interakciju između profesora i studenata te zahtijevajući od studenata da kritički brane svoje radove, čak i ako koriste AI alate.

Budućnost projekta uključuje daljnju automatizaciju skeniranja, razvoj AI modela za rijetke drevne jezike i širenje digitaliziranog sadržaja putem platformi Vulgate AI i Magisterium AI, čime se znanje čini dostupnim milijunima.
Crkva ima priliku biti predvodnik u korištenju tehnologije za dobro, pružajući pouzdane izvore informacija i promičući cjelovit razvoj čovjeka i zajedničko dobro kroz inovativne obrazovne pristupe.

AI nudi potencijal za personalizirano obrazovanje, prilagođavajući pedagoški pristup svakom učeniku, što može transformirati učenje i pripremiti studente za buduće tržište rada razvijajući ključne vještine poput kritičkog razmišljanja i suradnje.
summary.title_en: Unlocking ancient church libraries with the help of artificial intelligence | Katolički futurist
summary.abstract_en: This podcast explores the Alexandria Digitization Hub project in Rim, an initiative led by Father David Nazar and Matthew Harvey Sanders. The goal of the project is the digitization of ancient church texts using artificial intelligence and advanced scanners, making them globally accessible for research and education. The conversation emphasizes how AI enables the correction of historical errors, promotes ecumenical dialogue and transforms Catholic education, highlighting the potential of technology for human development and the common good.
key_topics_en: the influence of technology on education
challenges of digitalization of ancient texts
the future of AI in the Catholic Church
key_points_en: The Alexandria Digitization Hub project is digitizing the unique library of the Oriental Eastern Institute in Rome, which contains material about all Eastern churches, from Russia to Ethiopia and from southern Italy to southern India, with the goal of global accessibility.

Artificial intelligence enables advanced searching of texts in multiple ancient and modern languages, conceptually connecting terms, which opens unprecedented possibilities for in-depth research and analysis of historical documents.

Digitalization helps in the revision of historical narratives, such as the case of Nestorius, whose declaration as a heretic was perhaps the result of linguistic ambiguities and a lack of broader context, which AI can now clarify.

Technology, despite initial concerns, improves human communication in education, encouraging interaction between professors and students and requiring students to critically defend their works, even if they use AI tools.

The future of the project includes further automation of scanning, development of AI models for rare ancient languages, and the expansion of digitized content via the platforms Vulgate AI and Magisterium AI, whereby knowledge is made accessible to millions.

The Church has the opportunity to be a leader in the use of technology for good, providing reliable sources of information and promoting the integral development of man and the common good through innovative educational approaches.

AI offers potential for personalized education, adapting the pedagogical approach to each student, which can transform learning and prepare students for the future labor market by developing key skills such as critical thinking and collaboration.
